narrative.summary: Vinyl-forward bar/cafe/restaurant hybrid—good for a low-key, music-led night.

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐ "I went to check out Rooms coffee at Sounds Good. The space has a great vibe and I can see how it be a fun spot in the evening.
I ordered a cortado which was great and enjoyed drinking on their lovely patio. It’s a great spot to soak up some vitamin D.
I want to return in the evening to check out their food/drink offerings!"

⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Love the space, atmosphere and music! Will always go here to enjoy vinyl and their sound system is elite. We enjoyed the zucchini flowers and the bartender made us a boulevardier which was delish but most cocktails are on draft."

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Excellent music choices, excellent sound system, excellent food and excellent service. Easily one of my favorite recent new spots. Honestly, I loved every dish, but some favorites were definitely the beef cheek and the oysters. Staff is very attentive and friendly. Overall, a very strong recommend for anyone who is looking for good food and good music."
